cards.name: ⅩⅩⅠ The World
cards.interpretation: completion, achievement, fulfilment, sense of belonging, wholeness, harmony

cards.name: King of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: greed, materialistic, wasteful, chauvanist, poor financial decisions, gambler, exploitative, possessive

cards.name: 9 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality
